restoreMessage.error: Couldn't reach the store — try again.

reminderDenied: Allow notifications in iOS Settings to get reminders.

proSection.label: Whenbee Pro
proSection.title: Make my whole day honest
proSection.noteOn: Map your real buffers onto today's calendar.
proSection.noteOff: Auto-pad your calendar with your real buffers.
proSection.a11yOff: Go Pro and make your whole day honest

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.note: Pings for honest finish, start-by nudges, and more.

honestReached.title: Honest finish reached
honestReached.note: A ping when your honest estimate is up.

startBy.title: Start-by nudge
startBy.note: A reminder when it's time to begin your next task.

mondayReview.title: Monday review
mondayReview.note: A gentle nudge when your honest week is ready. Off by default.

quietHours.title: Quiet hours
quietHours.note: Suppress notifications during sleep or focus windows.

sound.title: Sound
sound.note: Tone played when a notification fires.

dailyCheckin.title: Daily check-in
dailyCheckin.note: Puts a line on Today that nudges you to log one thing, then checks off once you do. Skip a day and nothing breaks.

quickStart.title: Tap to start again
quickStart.note: A row of tasks you run often, up top on Today — one tap re-runs them. Turn off for a cleaner screen.

endOfDay.title: End of day
endOfDay.a11yOn: End of day, currently {{time}}. Tap to change.

calendar.label: Calendar

showEvents.title: Show calendar events
showEvents.note: Events appear read-only and count toward your honest-day capacity.

calendar.accessDeniedHint: Calendar access is off. Open iOS Settings → Whenbee → Calendar to allow it.

export.title: Add plan to a Whenbee calendar
export.noteOn: Whenbee uses its own calendar. Turning this off removes those events.
export.noteOff: After you run "Plan my day", the schedule goes straight to your calendar.
export.a11yOn: Add plan to a Whenbee calendar, currently on. Turning this off removes those events.
export.a11yOff: Add plan to a Whenbee calendar, currently off
export.writeDeniedHint: Calendar access is off. Go to iOS Settings, then Whenbee, then Calendar to allow it.
export.removeConfirmMessage: This removes all events Whenbee added to its own calendar. Your other calendars aren't touched.
export.lockedA11y: Add plan to a Whenbee calendar — Pro feature. Tap to upgrade.

exportReport.title: Export a report
exportReport.note: A clean PDF of your real time data to keep or share with a coach or doctor.

presence.label: Presence
presence.title: Keep your task on screen
presence.note: Your next task and its honest finish stay visible, even when Whenbee is closed.
presence.availableCaption: Available on the App Store build.
presence.ringOnCaption: Ring is on. Your honest finish shows on the Lock Screen while the timer runs.

widgetHelpAlert.title: How to add the widget
widgetHelpAlert.message: Long-press your Home Screen, tap +, search Whenbee, then choose "Next task".

manageSubscription.title: Manage subscription
manageSubscription.note: Change your plan or cancel in the App Store.

restorePurchases.title: Restore purchases
restorePurchases.note: Paid before? Bring your Pro access back.

resetProgress.title: Reset progress
resetProgress.note: Forget what it learned, keep your setup.

eraseEverything.title: Erase everything
eraseEverything.note: Wipe the app and start the welcome over.

unlockPro.title: Unlock Pro (testing)
unlockPro.note: Flip the Pro entitlement to preview every gated screen. For testing — leave off in normal use.

seedDemo.title: Seed demo data
seedDemo.note: Lay down ~2 months of logs across four categories so every Pro surface has something to show. Sim-only — resets the demo categories each run.

resetProgress.title: Reset your progress?
resetProgress.bullet1: Clears every logged time and what Whenbee learned.
resetProgress.bullet2: Keeps your categories, look, and reminders.
resetProgress.bullet3: Your Whenbee keeps its name and just starts growing again.

eraseEverything.title: Erase everything?
eraseEverything.bullet1: Deletes all of it: tasks, learning, categories, settings.
eraseEverything.bullet2: You'll start from the welcome screen, like a fresh install.
eraseEverything.bullet3: Pro isn't stored here, so 'Restore purchases' brings it back.

dayEndModal.title: When does your day wind down?

guardrail.title: Hyperfocus check-in
guardrail.captionLocked: A heads-up before a task eats your evening.
guardrail.captionFree: A gentle nudge when a task runs long.
guardrail.lockedA11y: Hyperfocus check-in, Pro feature. Tap to learn more.
